entry.title: New BOA N0002422G4304 awarded to ELECTRIC BOAT CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Ordering only for authorized procurement activities listed in the contract.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)
